_comment: Copy the contents of this file into the 'Load Config' node in workflow.json (or keep it here and load it however you prefer). Secrets are NOT stored here — they live in n8n credentials / environment variables; this file only references their names. All amounts are integer cents (USD minor units), matching the Sequence API.

llm._modelNote: Any vision-capable OpenRouter model works, e.g. 'openai/gpt-4o', 'google/gemini-2.5-pro'. Pick one and set OPENROUTER_API_KEY in n8n credentials.
